meta_subtitle: Discover the most played and efficient Brawlers based on real history.
error_missing_model: Database or model missing. Check the Training tab.
error_duplicate_brawlers: Duplicate Brawlers found in the draft.
predictor_subtitle: Analyze Brawl Stars compositions with Artificial Intelligence.
error_missing_db: Database not found. Run the Crawler first.
error_missing_artifacts: AI artifacts (.pkl) not found. Train the model first.
verdict_superior: Verdict: Superior composition. Solid advantage for Your Team!
verdict_disadvantage: Verdict: Structural disadvantage. The Enemy Team has control of the match.
verdict_balanced: Verdict: Highly balanced match. The outcome will depend purely on player skill.
trainer_subtitle: Manage the database and trigger predictive model recalibration.
critical_volume_warning: ⚠️ Critical Volume: The model needs at least 7,000 matches for mathematical generalization.
crawler_spinner: Communicating with Supercell API. This may take a few minutes...
crawler_success: Data batch collected successfully! Navigate to another page and return to update the numbers.
train_step1_spinner: Step 1/2: Extracting data from SQLite and compiling the CSV matrix...
train_step2_spinner: Step 2/2: Training the Gradient Boosting algorithm...
train_success: ✅ Pipeline complete! New model generated and saved to .pkl files.
train_info: You can return to the 'Static Predictor' tab to use the updated intelligence.
